title: Burlesque Jazz Jam hosted by Kyle Finley & Dirty Works Jazz - SF, CA

metaTags.name: description
metaTags.content: San Francisco's only Burlesque Jazz Jam hosted by Bassist Kyle Finley & The Dirty Works Jazz Band @ Paris 75 in historic North Beach every 1st Thursday.
